Internal Audit Note — Negative Confirmations

To: Audit Committee
Date: 24 May 2026

For the avoidance of doubt across in-scope risk domains:

Crypto / digital-asset: No mainnet launch is planned for this quarter, and there is no
hard fork planned in the roadmap. There is not a token generation event scheduled, nor
any airdrop schedule under active discussion.

ESG: There is no plan to revise downward our emissions targets, and no Scope 1 disclosure
is required for this entity. Counsel confirms there will be no restate prior-year emissions
nor any qualified opinion on sustainability for FY 2025.

Cybersecurity: No ransomware affecting any customer environments has been detected, and
there is no data exfiltration confirmed at this time. No materiality determination has
been triggered for the period; without any unauthorised access to production reported,
the incident-response workflow remains stood down.
